case_title: AFIAT,AMIR M. VS LITTLE SHAMROCK INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY AFIAT,AMIR M. AS TO DEFENDANT LITTLE SHAMROCK INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-07-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
FOR WORK AS WELL AS 1 WEEK VACATION ENTITLED UNDER STATE LABOR LAW.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LITTLE SHAMROCK INC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AFIAT,AMIR M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LITTLE SHAMROCK INC $180.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $195.00, DAMAGES FOR 2 WKS IMPLIED ORAL AGREEMENT THAT EMPLOYER AGREED TO PAY EMPLOYEE, PLFT DID NOT LOOK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
FOR WORK AS WERE AS 1 WEEK VACATION ENTITLED UNDER STATE LABOR LAW.
